news-global-econ.title: Exclusive — EPA Delivers on Trump's 'Freedom to Fix' Affordability Policy for Vehicle, Equipment Repairs

news-global-econ.title: Airport business geniuses are doing whatever they can to ensure World Cup fans get their ranch fix
news-global-econ.description: Ranch dressing is now being sold alongside World Cup merch at John F. Kennedy International Airport so fans can buy it past TSA and fly home.

news-global-econ.description:
The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) in July will vote on an order that would streamline satellite and earth station licensing processing to remove "outdate regulations" that hamper "America's growing commercial space economy."

news-global-soc.description: Dana White and Donald Trump reveal how they built the Octagon on the White House South Lawn in a new Fox Nation documentary launching Thursday.

news-global-soc.title: DAVID MARCUS: Calling 9/11 'inevitable' is same as justifying it, and it is disgraceful
news-global-soc.description: Milot Kiros, who defeated Rep. Diana DeGette in Denver, called 9/11 an inevitable consequence of American foreign policy in the Middle East.
